metadata.description: Production-tested Claude Code skills for software engineering, debugging, and process optimization

plugins.name: activejob-design-patterns
plugins.description: ActiveJob architecture patterns: fatal vs non-fatal error handling, transaction safety, external API integration, async enqueuing, internal batching, and operation-based idempotency.

plugins.name: activerecord-application-query-optimization
plugins.description: Prevents N+1 queries, duplicate joins, and missing eager loading in ActiveRecord. Covers batch preloading, SQL CASE consolidation, 8 N+1 discovery patterns, and join optimization.

plugins.name: activerecord-eager-loading-testing-patterns
plugins.description: Testing patterns for ActiveRecord eager loading: .association(:name).loaded? verification, query count tests, pattern-matching counts, and anti-patterns.

plugins.name: activerecord-graceful-corrupted-data-handling
plugins.description: Graceful handling of missing/corrupted foreign key data: .find_by for optional lookups, safe navigation with fallbacks, and callback nil guards with throw(:abort).

plugins.name: activerecord-idempotent-create-patterns
plugins.description: Idempotent API endpoints using find_or_create_by! to prevent race conditions and duplicate records. Covers case-insensitive dedup and guard vs idempotent pattern.

plugins.name: activerecord-query-performance-patterns
plugins.description: Three query performance techniques preventing 10-1000x PostgreSQL degradation: ILIKE index usage, two-phase DISTINCT optimization, and UNION ALL OR-splitting.

plugins.name: activerecord-transaction-boundary-optimization
plugins.description: Optimizes ActiveRecord transaction boundaries by moving read operations outside transaction blocks to reduce lock time and contention.

plugins.name: adversarial-agent-validation
plugins.description: Three-agent adversarial validation pattern exploiting LLM sycophancy: Finder (find), Adversary (disprove), Referee (score).

plugins.name: claude-audit
plugins.description: Audit CLAUDE.md files for redundancy, verbosity, stale references, conflicting rules, and optimization opportunities.

plugins.name: controller-input-validation-edge-cases
plugins.description: Guidance on implementing comprehensive input validation in Rails controller actions before processing to prevent edge case failures.

plugins.name: controller-transaction-render-pattern
plugins.description: Prevents double render errors and connection pool pollution in ActiveRecord transaction blocks.

plugins.name: counterintuitive-analyst
plugins.description: Framework for systematically questioning cultural trends and popular wisdom to reveal strategic insights.

plugins.name: cyclomatic-complexity-reduction
plugins.description: Reduce cyclomatic complexity in Ruby methods via early-return extraction, guard unification, and safe attribute access helpers.

plugins.name: database-migration-termination-safety
plugins.description: Guidance on what happens when database migrations are terminated mid-execution, how to design safe recoverable migrations, and running long migrati...

plugins.name: dead-code-detection
plugins.description: Systematic methodology for identifying orphaned files and dead code after refactoring.

plugins.name: first-principles-debugger
plugins.description: Systematic first-principles methodology for debugging complex issues that resist conventional approaches.

plugins.name: five-step-optimizer
plugins.description: Apply Elon Musk's Five-Step Algorithm to systematically optimize any process, system, or workflow through questioning, elimination, optimization, a...

plugins.name: hook-state-cascade-patterns
plugins.description: Reusable patterns for stateful Claude Code hooks: priority cascade routing, per-route daily cooldown, CWD-first state fallback, portable date parsi...

plugins.name: model-method-memoization-view-performance
plugins.description: Memoize model methods called multiple times per object during view rendering to reduce Ruby CPU and memory allocations.

plugins.name: multi-panel-formdata-sync
plugins.description: Fixes the querySelector('form') first-form bug when a Stimulus controller wraps a repeated list where each panel has its own hidden-field form.

plugins.name: rails-testing-patterns
plugins.description: Test type selection prioritizing integration tests (89-95% faster than system tests).

plugins.name: response-diversity
plugins.description: Vary response framing by context (learner, engineer, family, researcher) instead of defaulting to consulting/business framing.

plugins.name: root-cause-investigation
plugins.description: Dual-mode investigation framework combining Five Whys (systemic root cause analysis from Toyota/IDEO) and Peeling the Onion (psychological layer ex...

plugins.name: scanned-document-extraction
plugins.description: Extract structured data from scanned documents (images, PDFs) into markdown notes, preserving all granular detail.

plugins.name: security-patterns
plugins.description: Quick-reference security checklist for XSS, CSRF, PII logging, console statements, multi-tenant isolation, and state machine security in Rails view...

plugins.name: skill-decomposition-methodology
plugins.description: Systematic methodology for refactoring bloated skills (>500 lines) into focused sub-skills.

plugins.name: stimulus-controller-integration
plugins.description: Stimulus controller patterns for AJAX initialization, CustomEvent communication, and controller reuse.

plugins.name: stimulus-form-redirect
plugins.description: Replace AJAX + DOM manipulation with form submission + server redirect.

plugins.name: test-plan-methodology
plugins.description: Systematic 4-phase test planning approach to prevent coverage blind spots.

plugins.name: ai-coding-tool-portability
plugins.description: Guides portable configuration across Claude Code and OpenCode. Covers feature mapping, command mirroring via symlinks and home-manager, architecture layout.

plugins.name: changing-defaults-systematically
plugins.description: Systematically change configuration defaults and constants while ensuring zero regressions. Covers finding all references, updating code/tests/docs, comprehensive validation.

plugins.name: claude-code-hook-development
plugins.description: Guides creating, testing, and deploying Claude Code hooks via nix-darwin. Covers hook input JSON format, exit codes, stdout context injection, transcript JSONL parsing.

plugins.name: configuring-dynamic-attribution
plugins.description: Guides updating AI tool templates to use dynamic placeholders for model names instead of hardcoded values in commit attributions.

plugins.name: git-atomic-commit-organizer
plugins.description: Systematically analyze uncommitted changes and organize them into logical, atomic commits following best practices.

plugins.name: git-stash-pull-pop
plugins.description: Gracefully update a git repository from remote when you have unstaged local changes. Stashes changes, pulls, then restores them.

plugins.name: deployment-readiness
plugins.description: Systematic 5-phase checklist for production deployment: verify completion, prepare commit, create PR, deploy, and monitor.

plugins.name: cv-customization-workflow
plugins.description: Role-specific CV variants and cover letters: skills match scoring, reframing, de-AI voice pass, and two-agent quality gate.

plugins.name: neovim-configuration
plugins.description: Guides Neovim configuration through home-manager programs.neovim module. Covers plugin management, nvim-tree, theme consistency, buffer navigation, and PATH issues.

plugins.name: nix-darwin-multi-user
plugins.description: Guides multi-user nix-darwin configuration with home-manager. Covers mkDarwinConfig, sharedSystemModule, activation scripts, home-manager file conflicts.

plugins.name: nix-darwin-zsh-completion
plugins.description: Fixes zsh compinit insecure directories warning in nix-darwin. Covers enableGlobalCompInit vs completionInit differences between nix-darwin and home-manager.

plugins.name: nix-github-release-packaging
plugins.description: Packages pre-built binaries from GitHub releases as Nix derivations for home-manager. Covers stdenv.mkDerivation, fetchurl, SHA256 hash workflow.

plugins.name: disk-space-troubleshooting
plugins.description: Diagnose and resolve disk space issues on macOS with Nix. 5-level cleanup hierarchy from safe Nix GC to caches, with warning signs and Nix-specific symptom table.

plugins.name: nix-template-deployment
plugins.description: Guides deploying nix-template shell.nix and .envrc to directories for per-directory package availability via direnv. Covers home.packages vs devShell distinction.

plugins.name: nodejs-version-management
plugins.description: Guides Node.js and npm version management in Nix flakes. Covers system packages, activation scripts, devShells, version synchronization, pnpm configuration.

plugins.name: overriding-flake-input-packages
plugins.description: Guides fixing build failures in external flake inputs by overriding their derivations with overrideAttrs.

plugins.name: portable-ai-cli-patterns
plugins.description: Guides dual-tool configuration for Claude Code and OpenCode. Covers compatibility matrix, single-source commands, skill/agent promotion workflow.

plugins.name: qmd-local-search
plugins.description: Core patterns for using QMD (Quick Markdown) semantic search. Covers MCP tool usage, search type selection, index rebuild protocol, and troubleshooting.

plugins.name: reality-filter
plugins.description: Guides proper uncertainty labeling and verification standards during technical discussions. Covers evidence hierarchy, self-correction protocol.

plugins.name: red-team-framework-review
plugins.description: Systematic adversarial review of strategic frameworks. Challenges assumptions, identifies correlated failure modes, checks demand evidence.

plugins.name: skill-stack-deduplication
plugins.description: Eliminates content duplication across Claude Code agent/skill/command layers by establishing clear separation of concerns and reference hierarchies.

plugins.name: skills-audit
plugins.description: Inventory and audit skills for spec compliance and optimization. Two modes: triage (scan all) and deep audit (single skill).

plugins.name: framework-epistemology-audit
plugins.description: Pressure-test grand frameworks with 3 tests (falsifiability, independence, predictive specificity) and 4-level Pattern Verification Hierarchy. Distinguishes structural isomorphism from metaphorical resemblance.

plugins.name: framework-to-daily-workflow-integration
plugins.description: Embed abstract strategic frameworks into existing daily/weekly workflow commands as lightweight rituals. 4-step pattern: timescale mapping, daily touchpoint design, weekly audit structure, data flow wiring.

plugins.name: five-capabilities-audit
plugins.description: Identify AI-era development priorities via 2-step audit across five irreplaceable human capabilities: Computation, Transformation, Variation, Selection, Attention.

plugins.name: first-principles-framework
plugins.description: Three-mode first-principles methodology: problem decomposition with Rails/Stimulus debugging patterns, foundation building from observations to laws, and document summarization with length calibration.

plugins.name: existential-framework-builder
plugins.description: Transforms vague existential distress into structured inquiry frameworks with journaling prompts across 7 angles: future, past, counterfactual, relational, existential, synthesis, application.
